glosses.vi: nhà xuất bản; công ty xuất bản

sentences.target: Ich arbeite beim Verlag in Berlin.

translations.de: Ich arbeite beim Verlag in Berlin.
translations.en: I work at the publisher in Berlin.
translations.es: Trabajo en una editorial en Berlín.
translations.fr: Je travaille dans une maison d'édition à Berlin.
translations.it: Lavoro in una casa editrice a Berlino.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在柏林的一家出版社工作。
translations.yue: 我喺柏林嘅出版社做嘢。
translations.ru: Я работаю в издательстве в Берлине.
translations.pt: Eu trabalho em uma editora em Berlim.
translations.vi: Tôi làm việc ở một nhà xuất bản tại Berlin.
translations.ar: أنا أعمل في دار نشر في برلين.
translations.nl: Ik werk bij een uitgeverij in Berlijn.
translations.uk: Я працюю у видавництві в Берліні.
translations.hi: मैं बर्लिन के एक प्रकाशन गृह में काम करता हूँ.
translations.el: Δουλεύω σε έναν εκδοτικό οίκο στο Βερολίνο.
translations.nb: Jeg jobber i et forlag i Berlin.
translations.id: Saya bekerja di sebuah penerbit di Berlin.
translations.sv: Jag jobbar på ett förlag i Berlin.
translations.ro: Lucrez la o editură din Berlin.
translations.da: Jeg arbejder på et forlag i Berlin.
translations.ja: ベルリンの出版社で働いています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular.
Contraction of 'bei dem'; preposition governing dative, introducing location/affiliation.
Common noun, masculine; dative singular as complement of 'bei(m)'.
Preposition; here indicates location and takes dative.
Proper noun; object of the preposition 'in' (location, dative, no article).

translations.en: The publisher is looking for new authors.
translations.fr: La maison d'édition cherche de nouveaux auteurs.
translations.it: La casa editrice cerca nuovi autori.
translations.zh-Hans: 出版社正在寻找新作者。
translations.pt: A editora está procurando novos autores.
translations.vi: Nhà xuất bản đang tìm tác giả mới.
translations.ar: دار النشر تبحث عن مؤلفين جدد.
translations.hi: प्रकाशन गृह नए लेखक खोज रहा है.
translations.el: Ο εκδοτικός οίκος ψάχνει νέους συγγραφείς.
translations.ja: 出版社は新しい作家を探しています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative masculine singular; determiner for 'Verlag'.
Common noun, masculine; nominative singular subject.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive, selecting an accusative object.
Attributive adjective; plural accusative form agreeing with 'Autoren'.
Common noun, plural; accusative plural direct object.

sentences.target: Meine Freundin hat dem Verlag ihr Manuskript geschickt.
sentences.reading: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈfʁɔɪ̯ndɪn hat deːm fɛɐ̯ˈlaːk iːɐ̯ manʊsˈkʁɪpt ɡəˈʃɪkt/

translations.de: Meine Freundin hat dem Verlag ihr Manuskript geschickt.
translations.ipa: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈfʁɔɪ̯ndɪn hat deːm fɛɐ̯ˈlaːk iːɐ̯ manʊsˈkʁɪpt ɡəˈʃɪkt/
translations.en: My girlfriend sent her manuscript to the publisher.
translations.es: Mi novia envió su manuscrito a la editorial.
translations.fr: Ma copine a envoyé son manuscrit à la maison d'édition.
translations.it: La mia ragazza ha mandato il suo manoscritto alla casa editrice.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的女朋友把她的稿件发给了出版社。
translations.yue: 我女朋友將佢嘅稿件寄咗去出版社。
translations.ru: Моя девушка отправила свою рукопись в издательство.
translations.pt: Minha namorada enviou o manuscrito dela para a editora.
translations.he: חברה שלי שלחה את כתב היד שלה להוצאה לאור.
translations.vi: Bạn gái tôi đã gửi bản thảo cho nhà xuất bản.
translations.ar: صديقتी أرسلت مخطوطتها إلى دار النشر.
translations.nl: Mijn vriendin heeft haar manuscript naar de uitgeverij gestuurd.
translations.uk: Моя дівчина надіслала свій рукопис до видавництва.
translations.hu: A barátnőm elküldte a kéziratát a kiadónak.
translations.hi: मेरी प्रेमिका ने अपनी पांडुलिपि प्रकाशन गृह को भेजी.
translations.pl: Moja dziewczyna wysłała swój manuskrypt do wydawnictwa.
translations.el: Η κοπέλα μου έστειλε το χειρόγραφό της στον εκδοτικό οίκο.
translations.nb: Kjæresten min sendte manuskriptet sitt til forlaget.
translations.id: Pacar saya mengirim naskahnya ke penerbit.
translations.sv: Min flickvän skickade in sitt manus till förlaget.
translations.ro: Prietena mea și-a trimis manuscrisul la editură.
translations.cs: Moje přítelkyně poslala svůj rukopis do nakladatelství.
translations.da: Min kæreste sendte sit manuskript til forlaget.
translations.ja: 彼女は原稿を出版社に送った。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; nominative feminine singular agreeing with 'Freundin'.
Common noun, feminine; nominative singular subject.
Auxiliary verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; forms the Perfekt with 'geschickt'.
Definite article, dative masculine singular; determiner for 'Verlag' (indirect object).
Common noun, masculine; dative singular recipient (indirect object).
Possessive determiner; agrees with neuter singular 'Manuskript', referring to the possessor.
Common noun, neuter; accusative singular direct object (theme).
Past participle; lexical main verb in Perfekt, indicating completed action.

sentences.target: Ich rufe den Verlag morgen an.

translations.de: Ich rufe den Verlag morgen an.
translations.fr: Je vais appeler la maison d'édition demain.
translations.zh-Hans: 我明天会打电话给出版社。
translations.yue: 我聽日會打電話畀出版社。
translations.pt: Vou ligar para a editora amanhã.
translations.vi: Ngày mai tôi sẽ gọi cho nhà xuất bản.
translations.hi: मैं कल प्रकाशन गृह को फोन करूँगा.
translations.el: Θα τηλεφωνήσω στον εκδοτικό οίκο αύριο.
translations.da: Jeg ringer til forlaget i morgen.
translations.ja: 明日出版社に電話します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject.
Finite verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; part of the separable verb 'anrufen' (completed by particle 'an').
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner for 'Verlag' (direct object).
Common noun, masculine; accusative singular direct object (entity being called).
Temporal adverb modifying the verb phrase.
Separable verbal particle; completes the verb 'anrufen' ('to call by phone').
